name: worldmodelbench
description: A benchmark for evaluating world modeling ability in video generation models.

creators.name: World Model Bench Team
creators.affiliation: Nvidia, MIT, UC Berkeley, UC San Diego

recordSets.name: benchmark_instances
recordSets.description: Each record includes a text instruction, an initial video frame, and associated metadata for evaluation.

fields.name: text_instruction
fields.description: The instruction provided for the video generation task.

fields.name: text_first_frame
fields.description: Description of the initial video frame.

fields.name: first_frame
fields.description: Filename of the initial video frame image.

fields.name: domain
fields.description: The application domain of the prompt (e.g., Robotics, Driving).

fields.name: subdomain
fields.description: The specific subdomain within the application domain.
